title: Add a serve-worktree target to a project
description: Wire the @bespunky/nx-tools:serve-worktree executor onto a project so an in-flight git worktree can be served without merging it back (`nx run <project>:serve-worktree`). The per-app sibling of serve-options: applied by the house `app` generator to every app (first and later) and re-asserted by `scaffold.sh --repair`. Deploy- and framework-agnostic — the executor delegates to the project's own `serve` target (plain Angular dev-server or the Firebase orchestrator), so it runs for all projects. Idempotent.

project.description: Project to add the serve-worktree target to.

serveTarget.description: The target the executor runs inside the chosen worktree.
